title: canthium leschenaultii
intro: Canthium leschenaultii, also known as the "Razdar" or "Razdar tree", is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to the Western Ghats of India and Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Canthium leschenaultii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions, infusions, and powders, often used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams for various health applications.
